# Website48 - Complete Service Documentation

## Company Overview

Website48 is a Singapore-based web design service that creates professional websites for small and medium businesses at an affordable fixed price of $489 SGD. The core promise is delivery within 48 hours.

Unlike traditional agencies that charge $3,000-$15,000 and take weeks or months, Website48 offers agency-quality websites at a fraction of the cost with rapid turnaround.

## Service Details

### The Launch Package - $489 SGD

This is the main offering. It includes:

**Design & Development:**
- Custom website design (not a template)
- Up to 5 pages (Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.)
- Mobile-responsive design that works on all devices
- Fast-loading, optimized performance
- Modern, professional aesthetic

**Technical Setup:**
- Domain setup assistance (customer purchases domain separately)
- 12 months of web hosting included
- SSL certificate (HTTPS security)
- SEO-ready structure with proper meta tags

**Functionality:**
- Contact form with email notifications
- Google Maps integration
- Social media links
- WhatsApp click-to-chat button (optional)

**Support:**
- 30 days of post-launch support
- WhatsApp-based communication

### Add-On Services (Optional)

**Content & Changes:**
- Single content/design change: $19
- Unlimited changes forever: $148 (one-time)
- Additional page beyond 5: $98/page

**Branding:**
- Custom logo design: $48

**Advanced Features:**
- Multilanguage support: $148/language
- WhatsApp chat widget: $29
- Blog/CMS integration: $148
- AI-powered chatbot: $148
- Multi-step lead qualification form: $248
- Full SEO setup & Google indexing: $98

**Ongoing:**
- Hosting renewal after year 1: $29/month

## Target Customers

Website48 serves Singapore-based small businesses including:

1. **Food & Beverage**: Restaurants, cafes, hawker stalls, catering services
2. **Professional Services**: Real estate agents, lawyers, accountants, consultants
3. **Healthcare**: Medical clinics, dental practices, TCM, physiotherapy
4. **Education**: Tuition centres, enrichment classes, private tutors
5. **Personal Brands**: Freelancers, photographers, artists, coaches
6. **Home Services**: Renovation contractors, cleaning services, movers
7. **Retail**: Small shops wanting an online presence

## Competitive Positioning

**vs DIY Builders (Wix, Squarespace):**
- Same or lower cost when considering time investment
- Professional result without learning curve
- Done in 48 hours vs weeks of self-building

**vs Freelancers ($500-$2,000):**
- Faster delivery (48 hours vs 2-4 weeks)
- Fixed price with no scope creep
- Reliable quality standards

**vs Agencies ($3,000-$15,000):**
- 85-95% cost savings
- Suitable for businesses that don't need enterprise features
- Perfect for SMEs with limited budgets

## Process

1. Customer contacts via WhatsApp (+65 8012 4848)
2. Brief consultation to understand requirements
3. Customer provides: business info, logo, photos, content ideas
4. Website48 designs and builds the site
5. Customer reviews and provides feedback
6. Final revisions and launch within 48 hours
7. 30 days of support for any questions

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is $489 really the full price?**
A: Yes. $489 covers design, development, and 12 months of hosting. The only separate cost is your domain name (typically $15-30/year, purchased by customer).

**Q: What if I need changes after launch?**
A: 30 days of support is included. After that, single changes are $19, or get unlimited changes forever for $148.

**Q: Do I own my website?**
A: Yes. You own all content and design. If you ever want to move to another host, we'll help with the transition.

**Q: What industries do you work with?**
A: Any legitimate Singapore business. Most common: F&B, real estate, healthcare, education, professional services.

**Q: How do I get started?**
A: WhatsApp us at +65 8012 4848 or visit https://website48.com

## Contact Information

- **Blog**: https://website48.com/blog/

## Schema.org Structured Data Reference

The website uses the following schema types for search engines and AI:
- ProfessionalService (main business)
- Product/Offer (pricing page)
- FAQPage (main page FAQ section)
- BlogPosting (blog articles)
